settings.title: What is Kalatantu?
settings.content:
Threads of Tradition, Woven with Purpose

Kalatantu, meaning “a thread of art” in Sanskrit, is inspired by India’s timeless textile heritage. It is a tribute to the skilled artisans who have preserved traditional crafts with care and devotion. Every piece reflects their artistry and the cultural legacy passed down through generations.

We believe tradition belongs in the present. At Kalatantu, we revive age-old techniques and thoughtfully adapt them for modern wardrobes. Our designs honour the past while resonating with today’s women who seek beauty with meaning.

In an era of fast fashion, we stand for conscious creation. Each product is made with intention, encouraging mindful choices and deeper connections. Sustainability, quality, and cultural relevance guide everything we do.

settings.title: Are your products handmade?
settings.content: Yes. Every Kalatantu product is handcrafted by skilled artisans using traditional techniques passed down through generations. From weaving to embroidery, each piece tells a story of heritage and craftsmanship.

settings.title: What does GI-tagged mean?
settings.content: GI (Geographical Indication) tags protect traditional crafts that originate from specific regions. At Kalatantu, we showcase authentic GI-tagged crafts such as Chikankari, Banarasi, and more, ensuring originality and cultural value.

settings.title: Where are your artisans based?
settings.content: We collaborate with artisan clusters across India, including Lucknow for Chikankari and Varanasi for Banarasi, among others. We believe in direct partnerships that empower local communities.

settings.title: How do I know my Kalatantu piece is authentic?
settings.content: Each piece comes with information about the artisan, region, and craft technique used. We maintain full transparency to help you connect with the hands behind your garment.

settings.title: How can I place an order?
settings.content: You can place an order directly through our website. Browse the collection, add your favourites to the cart, and check out with secure payment options.

settings.title: Do you ship internationally?
settings.content: Yes, we ship across India and internationally. Delivery timelines and charges may vary depending on your location.

settings.title: What is your return policy?
settings.content: As each item is handcrafted, we encourage mindful purchases. However, if you receive a damaged or incorrect product, please contact us within 24 hours of delivery for return and read our return &  cancellation policy.

settings.title: How do you support artisans?
settings.content: We collaborate directly with artisan groups across India, offering consistent work, creative involvement, and meaningful visibility. At Kalatantu, we prioritise respect and recognition for their skills, heritage, and the cultural value they bring to every handcrafted piece. We also share their stories to honour their legacy and craftsmanship.

settings.title: How can I care for my Kalatantu product?
settings.content: Most of our products are made with delicate natural fabrics and handwork. We recommend dry cleaning or gentle hand wash, and avoiding harsh detergents to preserve the craft.

settings.title: Can I collaborate with Kalatantu as an artisan or designer?
settings.content: We’re always open to meaningful collaborations. Please reach out to us at info@kalatantu.com with your proposal or portfolio.

settings.title: How can I stay updated on your latest collections?
settings.content: Follow us on Instagram, Facebook, and subscribe to our newsletter for the latest drops, artisan stories, and behind-the-scenes content.

settings.title: How should I care for my Kalatantu product?
settings.content:
To ensure the longevity and beauty of your handcrafted Kalatantu pieces, please follow these care guidelines:
  • Dry clean only, unless specified otherwise.
  • Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight.
  • Wrap garments in muslin cloth to allow the fabric to breathe.
  • Iron on low heat from the reverse side to protect delicate embroidery and weaves.
  • Avoid harsh chemicals, strong detergents, or bleach.

settings.title: Do you have any physical store?
settings.content: We currently operate as an online-only brand, allowing us to offer a curated range of handcrafted products directly to our customers without geographical limitations. For updates on new collections and behind-the-scenes insights, we invite you to follow us on our social media channels. Our team is always available to assist you with any queries.

settings.title: Is my payment method secure?
settings.content: Yes, absolutely. We use Razorpay, one of India’s most trusted and secure payment gateways. Your payment information is encrypted and processed safely, ensuring a smooth and worry-free checkout experience.

settings.title: What are the advantages of handloom fabrics?
settings.content:
Handloom fabrics offer a blend of comfort, sustainability, and cultural heritage:

  • Breathable & Comfortable – Made from natural fibers that are gentle on the skin.
  • Durable & High Quality – Tightly woven to last longer and reduce frequent replacements.
  • One-of-a-Kind – Each piece is handcrafted, showcasing unique artistry.
  • Eco-Friendly & Biodegradable – Crafted using traditional methods with minimal energy use.
  • Culturally Sustainable – Helps preserve India’s weaving traditions.
  • Empowers Artisans – Supports rural livelihoods and weaver independence.
  • Chemical-Free – Made without harsh chemicals, making them safer for your skin and health.

settings.title: How do I track my order?
settings.content:
Once your order is shipped, you will receive tracking details via email from our courier partner. If you need further assistance, feel free to contact our team at:
+91 90330 69797
info@kalatantu.com

settings.heading: Have a question
settings.content:
If you have an issue or question that requires immediate assistance, you can click the button below to chat live with a Customer Service representative.

Please allow 06 - 12 business days from the time your package arrives back to us for a refund to be issued.
